metadata.title: Group Piano Lessons in Gatineau | Piano a Tempo
metadata.description: Group piano lessons in Gatineau: dynamic learning, shared repertoire, and motivated progress for kids, teens, and adults.
metadata.openGraphDescription: A motivating environment to learn piano in a group in Gatineau.

hero.tagline: Group piano lessons for every age
hero.title: Group Piano Lessons in Gatineau
hero.description: A comprehensive learning experience that combines piano technique, music theory, ear training, rhythm exercises, and ensemble playing.

images.title: Inside our group classes
images.classroomAlt: Students learning piano together in a group class
images.classroomCaption: With a dedicated piano station for every student, lessons balance individual practice with collaborative learning.
images.teacherAlt: Teacher interacting with a piano student during a group lesson
images.teacherCaption: Collaborative learning allows students to gain valuable experience in ensemble playing.

benefits.title: Benefits of group classes
items: Gain experience playing in an ensemble setting
Develop better timing when playing together
Learn from questions asked by other students
Build friendships through a shared interest in music
Stay motivated by progressing alongside other students

teaching.title: How we teach group lessons
teaching.description: Through a balance of theory, practical application, listening exercises, ensemble playing, and personalized feedback, students develop both the skills and habits needed for long-term musical success.
points: Explanation of music theory concepts using the whiteboard
Application of newly learned concepts on individual mini whiteboards or printed worksheets
Analysis of the main score, including note identification and rhythm recognition
Group activities focused on rhythm, listening skills, and ensemble playing
Demonstration and explanation of proper hand movements and technique
Personalized feedback from the teacher for each student
Clear weekly goals with practical guidance for effective home practice

organization.title: How it works
organization.description: Groups are organized by age and level, with clear goals for each session.
points: Each student has their own keyboard station with headphones, so everyone can focus while still being part of the group.
The teacher introduces the concept to the whole class, then walks between students to coach each one individually.
Activities alternate between individual practice with headphones and short group moments for rhythm, listening, and ensemble work.
Students receive personalized corrections during class, then leave with a clear practice target for the week.

options.title: All available group lesson options
options.description: Choose the option that best matches age and schedule. You can select one below and contact us to reserve a spot.

cta.title: Find your group
cta.description: Reach out to check availability based on age, level, and schedule.
